description_long: This is a robust hammer with a large, rectangular metallic head featuring intricate engravings on its sides and a smooth, flat striking face. The head is predominantly a dark gray metal, accented with silver edges and decorative panels. The handle is cylindrical, wrapped in a textured, brown material that appears to provide a secure grip, and ends with a rounded metallic pommel. The hammer's design is reminiscent of a ceremonial or fantasy tool, with a heavy, solid build and detailed craftsmanship. The overall appearance suggests it is intended for heavy-duty or symbolic use rather than typical carpentry. No visible signs of wear, branding, or additional attachments are present.
description: A heavy, ornate hammer with a large engraved metal head and a textured brown handle, designed for strength and visual impact.
description_view_0: Angled view showing the engraved side of the metallic head and the textured brown handle.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the flat striking face of the hammer head and the circular end cap.
description_view_2: Opposite angled view highlighting the other engraved side and the length of the handle.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the end of the handle and the back of the hammer head.
attribute_handle_type: Textured cylindrical handle wrapped in brown leather, straight with visible grip enhancements and a rounded metallic pommel.
attribute_head_type: Large rectangular sledge-type head with flat striking faces and intricate engravings on the sides, made of solid metal.
